font-bold",children:s==="ar"?"لا توجد قيود مطابقة للفلاتر المحددة":"No records match selected filters."})}):h.map(t=>{const n=c.find(l=>l.id===t.productId),u=x.find(l=>l.id===t.customerId),b=p.find(l=>l.id===t.supplierId),d=m.find(l=>l.id===t.warehouseId),r=M.find(l=>l.id===t.cashierId);return whitespace-nowrap",children:new Date(t.date).toLocaleString(s==="ar"?"ar-EG":"en-US")}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:e.jsx("span",{className:`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider ${t.type==="OUT"?"bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-100":t.type==="IN"?"bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-100":"bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-100"}`,children:t.type==="OUT"?s==="ar"?"بيع مبيعات":"Sale":t.type==="IN"?s==="ar"?"توريد شراء":"Purchase":t.type==="SALE_RETURN"?s==="ar"?"مرتجع مبيعات":"Sale Return":s==="ar"?"مرتجع شراء":"Purchase Return"})}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:[e.jsx("div",{className:"font-bold text-slate-800 text-[11px] leading-tight",children:n?n.name:"Unknown"}),e.jsx("div",{className:"text-[9px] text-slate-400 font-mono mt-0.5",children:n?n.code:"-"})]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-center font-mono bg-indigo-400"}),u?u.name:s==="ar"?"عميل نقدي":"Cash Customer"]}):e.jsxs("span",{className:"flex items-center gap-1",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400"}),b?b.name:s==="ar"?"مورد غير معروف":"Restock Supplier"]})}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-slate-500 text-[11px]",children:d?String((d==null?void 0:d.name)??"").split("|")[0].trim():"-"}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:[e.jsx("div",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-800 font-bold whitespace-nowrap",children:r?String((r==null?void 0:r.name)??"").split("|")[0].trim():"-"}),e.jsx("div",{className:"text-[8px] text-slate-400 font-semibold uppercase",children:r?r.role:"-"})]})]},t.id)})})]})})]})]})}export{_ as ReportsScreen};
